info.title: MIT Healthcare Centre Backend API
info.description: Backend API for MIT Healthcare Centre system

post.description: Authenticate staff users (receptionist, doctor, nurse, pharmacist, admin) and issue JWT

get.description: Returns comprehensive system statistics including user counts, visit counts, and patient overview

get.summary: Get patient demographics and visit trends
get.description: Returns patient demographics by gender and visit trends for the last 6 months
Returns list of all system users with optional filtering by role, status, and search query

post.description: Admin-only endpoint to register new staff members (no public signup)

patch.description: Update a user's status (active, inactive, suspended, pending). Requires reason for suspension.

400.description: Bad request - Status or reason missing

delete.description: Permanently delete a user and their associated role profile. Cannot delete users with existing visits (doctors/patients).

400.description: Bad request - Cannot delete user with existing visits or own account

message.example: Cannot delete doctor with existing visits

get.description: Returns list of all doctors with their details and availability status
Returns list of all receptionists with their daily statistics
Returns list of all nurses with their qualifications and daily task statistics
Returns list of all pharmacists with their daily transaction statistics
Returns list of all visits with optional filters for date and status
Returns medicine inventory with stock levels, batch counts, and expiry information. Supports filtering by status and search.
Returns system logs including pharmacy transactions and nurse task completions with date filtering (last 200 records)

description.example: Medicine Paracetamol 500mg issued by Rajesh Kumar for 7 days

post.description: Receptionist registers a new patient (creates PATIENT user + patient profile)
Receptionist creates a visit for a patient
Receptionist records vitals for a visit

get.description: Returns all SCHEDULED and IN_PROGRESS visits assigned to the specified doctor

parameters.name: doctor_id
parameters.description: The ID of the doctor to fetch visits for

patch.description: Receptionist assigns or reassigns a doctor to an existing visit
Receptionist updates a doctor's availability status (AVAILABLE/BUSY/OFF_DUTY)

get.description: Returns list of doctors with availability_status = 'AVAILABLE'

get.summary: Get today's visit count for doctor
get.description: Returns the count of visits assigned to a specific doctor for a given date

400.description: Bad request - Missing doctor_id or date

get.description: Returns list of all available nurses in the system
Returns detailed information about a specific nurse
Search for medicines by name. Returns up to 50 results.

post.description: Create a new medicine entry in the system

400.description: Bad request - Missing name or type

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific medicine
Returns all visits for a doctor that are SCHEDULED, ONGOING, DIAGNOSED, or PRESCRIBED
Returns comprehensive medical history including past visits, diagnoses, prescriptions, lab tests, and vitals

patch.description: Updates the status of a visit (SCHEDULED, ONGOING, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, DIAGNOSED, PRESCRIBED, NURSING, PHARMACY)

post.summary: Create prescription with automatic nurse task assignment
post.description: Creates a prescription with multiple medicines. Automatically creates nurse tasks for injectable medicines (Injection/DRIP)

201.description: Prescription and nurse tasks created successfully

get.description: Returns the authenticated student's profile information

put.description: Allows student to update their phone and emergency contact

get.summary: Get student's visit history with filters
get.description: Returns all visits for the authenticated student with optional filters for date range, status, and doctor name

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter visits up to this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

get.summary: Get student's prescription history with filters
get.description: Returns all prescriptions for the authenticated student with optional filters

get.summary: Get student's lab test history with filters
get.description: Returns all lab tests for the authenticated student with optional filters

get.summary: Get student's vitals history with filters
get.description: Returns all vitals records for the authenticated student with optional date range filters
Returns list of doctors with availability_status = 'AVAILABLE', optionally filtered by specialization

post.description: Authenticate nurse and issue JWT token. This endpoint is maintained for backward compatibility. New implementations should use /api/auth/login

get.summary: Get nurse profile by user ID
get.description: Retrieve nurse profile information using user_id
Retrieve all tasks assigned to a specific nurse with visit and patient details
Retrieve detailed information about a specific nurse task including medicine details

post.description: Mark a nurse task as completed and create a transaction record with observation notes

post.summary: Register a new pharmacist (DEPRECATED - Use admin endpoint)
post.description: Register a new pharmacist with user credentials. This endpoint is maintained for backward compatibility.
Authenticate pharmacist and issue JWT token. This endpoint is maintained for backward compatibility. New implementations should use /api/auth/login

get.description: Retrieve pharmacist profile information using pharmacist_id query parameter

patch.description: Update pharmacist profile information (name, email, phone)

get.description: Retrieve all prescriptions with PENDING status including patient and doctor information

200.description: List of pending prescriptions retrieved successfully

get.description: Retrieve detailed medicine information for a specific prescription including available batches

post.description: Issue medicines to a patient, reduce stock from specified batches, generate PDF and send email

400.description: Missing required fields or insufficient stock

message.example: Insufficient stock for batch BATCH001. Available: 10

get.description: Retrieve all pharmacy transaction history with patient, doctor, and pharmacist details
Retrieve detailed medicine information for a specific pharmacy transaction
Retrieve all medicines with their active batches, stock levels, and expiry dates

post.description: Add a new batch for an existing medicine with stock quantity and expiry date

delete.description: Delete a medicine batch and log the deletion in medicine_stock_log

200.description: Medicine batch deleted and logged successfully

message.example: Medicine batch deleted and logged successfully

delete.description: Clear an expired medicine batch and log the clearance in medicine_log

200.description: Medicine batch cleared and logged successfully

message.example: Medicine batch cleared and logged successfully

post.summary: Add new medicine with initial stock
post.description: Add a completely new medicine to the system along with its first batch

get.description: Retrieve all medicine batches with EXPIRED status

500.description: Unable to fetch expired medicine batches

get.summary: Get optimal medicine batches for prescription
get.description: Retrieve optimal batch allocation for a medicine based on duration and quantity. Prioritizes near-expiry batches for short duration, and longer expiry for longer duration.

message.example: Insufficient stock to fulfill required quantity

post.description: Create a new system user (admin only). The password is hashed with bcrypt before storing.

get.description: List all system users (admin only)
Fetch a single user by UUID (admin only)

password.description: New plain-text password to be hashed with bcrypt
